meaning: vbl.重新开动,重新进行(rerun的过去式)
examples: I also reran the tests without this annotation to make sure I was getting the same results that a standard server would see.
To answer these questions, I reran those benchmarks but picked random elements of integers instead of sequential elements.
Factoring in these and other mitigators, Bamber's team reran the computer models and came up with their newer, slightly rosier forecast.
To see how consistent they have been, Mr Evans reran his calculations using net profit and market-capitalisation figures for previous years.
